They acknowledge the return of economics and yields as key FX drivers which implies that dollar strength may be the path of least resistance, at least in 3Q, and for as long as US economic exceptionalism dominates. Win and Audrey also share respective views on Fed policy, with low market conviction in t

On this week’s episode of the ESG Currents podcast, Clay Brown, chief standards officer at B Lab, joins Eric Kane, Bloomberg Intelligence director of ESG research, to discuss how companies balance fiduciary responsibilities with commitments to people

Then we build systems, automation and processes around handling those failures gracefully.” In this episode of Tech Disruptors, the pair discuss

title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports After Ukraine’s Refinery Attacks
title_cn: 乌克兰炼油厂遇袭后俄罗斯禁止柴油出口
summary: Russia banned exports of diesel to avoid domestic shortages after a flurry of attacks by Ukrainian drones on the nation’s refineries. International prices for the fuel surged.

title: IMF Says AI Offsets Middle East Fallout
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示人工智能抵消了中东的影响
summary: The International Monetary Fund left its global growth forecast largely unchanged for this year, saying that the boom in artificial intelligence helped offset the fallout from conflict in the Middle East. Petya Koeva Brooks, Deputy Director of the IMF's Research Department, discusses the updated World Economic Outlook report on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张局势刺激石油价格上涨，股市下跌
summary:
A flare-up in geopolitical risks drove stocks lower, bond yields rose and oil climbed as President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, noting the US would probably launch further strikes.
From New York to London and Tokyo, equities retreated. Almost 400 shares in the S&P 500 dropped, though chipmakers bounced.
Sarah Hunt, Chief Market Strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, discusses these market gyrations amid geopolitical swings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Prices Surge, Brent Rises above $80 as Trump Ends Ceasefire
title_cn: 特朗普结束停火，油价飙升，布伦特原油价格升至 80 美元以上
summary: Oil jumped above $80 a barrel after US President Donald Trump said a tentative ceasefire with Iran was over, reigniting geopolitical risk premium in prices and triggering investor concern about supply disruptions.

title: US Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High as Global Bond Selloff Deepens
title_cn: 全球债券抛售加剧，美国两年期国债收益率接近 2026 年高点
summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张局势刺激石油价格上涨，股市下跌：市场结束
summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks drove stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, noting the US would probably launch further strikes.

title: ¿Por qué el péndulo de Argentina podría romperse en 2027?
title_cn: 为什么阿根廷的钟摆可能会在2027年断裂？
summary: ¿Y si esta vez se termina el péndulo en Argentina? El mercado ya mira hacia 2027 y empieza a ver señales de que el riesgo político que durante décadas espantó a los inversores podría estar cambiando.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Estonia Willing to Contribute to Free Passage in Hormuz, PM Says
title_cn: 总理表示爱沙尼亚愿意为霍尔木兹海峡的自由通行做出贡献
summary: Estonia's Prime Minister Kristen Michal said the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, has been a positive one. He also said his country would be willing to contribute to efforts securing free passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Michal spoke to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook on the sidelines of the summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Drops on Rate-Hike Fears as Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火结束，金价因加息担忧而下跌
summary: Gold dropped as US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran has ended, stoking concerns that a renewal of fighting could again drive inflation and push up interest rates.

title: Dream Finders Homes Boosts Bid for Beazer to $875 Million
title_cn: Dream Finders Homes 将 Beazer 的出价提高至 8.75 亿美元
summary: Dream Finders Homes Inc. boosted its takeover offer for rival homebuilder Beazer Homes USA Inc., which said it’s received interest from other potential suitors.

title: Victoria Signs Deal With Left-Behind Bondholders
title_cn: 维多利亚州与留守债券持有人签署协议
summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc and a group of bondholders left behind in an earlier debt deal have struck an agreement over a balance sheet restructuring.

title: Emerging-Market Assets Slide as Threats to Iran Ceasefire Mount
title_cn: 随着伊朗停火威胁加剧，新兴市场资产下滑
summary: Emerging-market assets sank Wednesday after the US renewed strikes on Iran and threatened to reimpose a blockade on its oil, pushing the price of crude back up and undermining the fragile ceasefire.

title: Suposta Fraude Bancária Cria Nuvem Sobre Império de Edir Macedo
title_cn: 涉嫌银行欺诈给埃迪尔·马塞多的帝国蒙上阴影
summary: Uma suposta fraude em um banco brasileiro está lançando dúvidas sobre a igreja evangélica mais poderosa do país, fundada e liderada por um bispo conservador bilionário. Com Matheus Piovesana. Edição de Patricia Xavier e produção de Mariana Lumy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech’s $25 Billion Mega Bond Sales Are Pushing Market Limits
title_cn: 大型科技公司 250 亿美元的巨额债券销售正在突破市场极限
summary: Once a rare event reserved for historic mega-acquisitions, the jumbo bond sale is increasingly becoming the tech sector’s go-to financing tool.

title: Cantor, Adam Back’s BSTR Seek New Terms for Bitcoin SPAC Merger
title_cn: Cantor、Adam Back 的 BSTR 寻求比特币 SPAC 合并的新条款
summary: A Cantor Fitzgerald-backed blank-check company and Adam Back’s Bitcoin investment company scrapped the original terms of their planned merger and will negotiate a revised deal, as a tougher market for crypto challenges Bitcoin treasury companies.

title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Value
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova筹集了价值110亿美元的资金
summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.

title: Argentina’s Political Parties Look for Ways to Avoid Extremes
title_cn: 阿根廷政党寻找避免极端行为的方法
summary: For decades, Argentina’s economic pendulum has whipsawed investors by swinging from one ideological extreme to another, as each new administration dismantled the framework built by its predecessor.

title: US Stocks Slide After Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火结束后美国股市下跌
summary: US equities fell as investors turned risk averse after President Donald Trump said the tentative ceasefire with Iran has ended, fueling concerns of a renewal in fighting.

title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
title_cn: Nvidia 的 1 万亿美元下滑使估值达到人工智能繁荣之前的水平
summary: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is the cheapest it’s been since before the AI boom kicked off and sent the shares into the stratosphere.

title: Allstate Sued by Oklahoma for Alleged Scheme to Curb Claims
title_cn: 好事达因涉嫌遏制索赔计划而被俄克拉荷马州起诉
summary: Oklahoma’s attorney general sued Allstate Corp., alleging the insurer schemed to minimize payouts to homeowners for wind and hailstorm damage in order to boost its profits.

title: Qatar Economic Forum Will Hold New York Event in September
title_cn: 卡塔尔经济论坛将于9月在纽约举行
summary: The Qatar Economic Forum will hold a leadership event in New York alongside the United Nations General Assembly in September.

title: One Way to Fix Social Security
title_cn: 解决社会保障问题的一种方法
summary: There’s a way to fix one major issue with Social Security using the gig economy according to economist and Bloomberg Opinion columnist Kathryn Anne Edwards. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentina to Repay $4 Billion, Defying Critics Who Doubted Tack
title_cn: 阿根廷将偿还 40 亿美元，无视质疑策略的批评者
summary: Argentina is set to make a major payment on its dollar bonds this week, pulling off a feat few investors thought possible while the country refuses to tap global debt markets.

title: Yardeni Says Inflation, Fed Back in Play as Iran Crisis Returns
title_cn: 亚德尼表示，伊朗危机卷土重来，通胀将再次发挥作用
summary: Market strategist Ed Yardeni said the rupture in the ceasefire between the US and Iran risks sparking a fresh acceleration in price growth, which in turn could compel the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Pricey Credit Markets Fuel Funds That Can Buy Anything
title_cn: 昂贵的信贷市场为可以购买任何东西的资金提供动力
summary: Bond investors are increasingly betting on flexible funds that can buy whatever they like as lofty credit market valuations leave little margin for error.

title: UK Defense Chiefs Push Burnham to Consider Issuing War Bonds
title_cn: 英国国防部长敦促伯纳姆考虑发行战争债券
summary: Senior defense officials are pushing Andy Burnham to reconsider loosening the UK’s fiscal rules to help fund its military, including by issuing war bonds.

title: Omani Shipping Firm Asyad’s Owner Is Said to Weigh Stake Sale
title_cn: 据说阿曼航运公司 Asyad 的所有者正在考虑出售股份
summary: A conglomerate backed by Oman’s sovereign wealth fund is looking to sell a stake worth in the shipping business it listed last year, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Ather Is Said to Plan $200 Million India Fundraise
title_cn: 据说 Ather 计划在印度筹款 2 亿美元
summary: Ather Energy Ltd. is planning a share sale to institutional investors as early as next week, according to people familiar with the matter, to raise as much as $157 million.

title: Stocks Drop, Oil Jumps After Trump Says Ceasefire with Iran Is "Over" | Bloomberg Brief 07/08/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示与伊朗的停火“结束”后股市下跌，油价上涨彭博简报 07/08/2026
summary: US equity futures slump and oil extends gains as President Trump says a tentative ceasefire with Iran is over. The US had struck 80 sites in Iran ahead of the president's remarks at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. Mark McCormick of BMO Capital Markets discusses the impact of fresh geopolitical tensions.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oman Fertilizer Firm Defies War Worries and Surges 23% on Debut
title_cn: 阿曼化肥公司无视战争忧虑，上市后股价飙升 23%
summary: Oman India Fertiliser Co. jumped more than 23% on its Muscat trading debut after raising 261 million Omani rials ($678 million) in the region’s largest initial public offering of the year.

title: Infrastructure Software is 'Place to Be' Amid AI Trade, Says Fatima Boolani
title_cn: 法蒂玛·布尔尼 (Fatima Boolani) 表示，基础设施软件是人工智能贸易中的“一席之地”
summary: Fatima Boolani, Co-Head of US Software Equity Research at Citi, discusses the tech selloff and why infrastructure software is so important amid the AI trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Steve Pagliuca Says AI, Pharma, Sports Are Key Investment Focus
title_cn: Steve Pagliuca 表示人工智能、制药、体育是重点投资焦点
summary: PagsGroup Chief Executive Officer Stephen Pagliuca sees a clutch of growing industries, including artificial intelligence and sports, as a key focus for investment over the long term.

title: Blue Owl Unveils Infrastructure Venture Catering to Data Centers
title_cn: Blue Owl 推出面向数据中心的基础设施风险投资公司
summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. is launching a new venture geared toward the data-center boom that will develop, own and operate fiber networks that are key to the infrastructure buildout.

title: Apple’s Chip Deal With Broadcom Expected to Top $30 Billion
title_cn: 苹果与博通的芯片交易预计将突破 300 亿美元
summary: Apple Inc., following through on a pledge to boost spending on US-made components, said its expanded agreement with Broadcom Inc. is expected to top $30 billion.

title: Financials Have Been 'Less Loved,' Hermann Says
title_cn: 赫尔曼表示，金融股“不太受青睐”
summary: Julia Hermann, Global Market Strategist at New York Life Investment Management, says financials have been "less loved" by the market, but she says the sector is not strapped for cash and is a high quality area of the market. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Disney Executive Named CEO of Film Distributor Fathom
title_cn: 迪士尼前高管被任命为电影发行商 Fathom 首席执行官
summary: Jason Brenek plans to release more faith-based movies and independent films

title: IMF Says AI to Help Offset War-Driven Slowdown But Risks Remain
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示人工智能有助于抵消战争驱动的经济放缓，但风险仍然存在
summary: The International Monetary Fund left its global growth forecast largely unchanged for this year, saying that the boom in artificial intelligence helped offset the fallout from the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Crypto-Focused VC Firm Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion for AI Bets
title_cn: 专注于加密货币的风险投资公司 Paradigm 为人工智能投资筹集了 12 亿美元
summary: Paradigm, the venture firm founded to invest in cryptocurrency companies, has raised a new $1.2 billion fund to make more bets outside of the sector, including artificial intelligence and robotics.

title: Mistral AI Releases Robotics Model to Support Physical AI Push
title_cn: Mistral AI 发布机器人模型支持物理 AI 推送
summary: Mistral AI announced a new robotics navigation model, as the French startup expands in the emerging field of physical artificial intelligence after signing deals with major European industrial customers.

title: Yardeni Says Inflation, Fed Back in Play on Iran Crisis
title_cn: 亚德尼称通胀、美联储在伊朗危机中发挥作用
summary: Ed Yardeni, president of Yardeni Research, says the flare-up of fighting with Iran rekindles market concern that rising oil prices will stoke inflation -- and force the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Douglas Elliman Bets on AI to Reinvent Brokerage Business
title_cn: 道格拉斯艾丽曼 (Douglas Elliman) 押注人工智能重塑经纪业务
summary: Luxury real estate brokerage Douglas Elliman Inc. is betting artificial intelligence can expand its business beyond buying and selling homes.

title: AI Firm Zhipu to Sell $4 Billion of Shares After 1,500% Rally
title_cn: 人工智能公司智普在股价上涨 1,500% 后将出售 40 亿美元股票
summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is seeking to raise about $4 billion from a share sale after its stock soared almost 1,500% since a January listing in Hong Kong.

title: Samsung Sends Chip Investors on Another Roller Coaster Ride
title_cn: 三星芯片投资者再次坐过山车
summary: The company’s strong earnings fell short of an ever-rising bar for chipmakers

title: Wave of Earnings Surprises Will Be Hard to Repeat, Says Goldman
title_cn: 高盛表示，盈利惊喜浪潮将难以重演
summary: The wave of AI-fueled earnings surprises that powered stocks in the last earning season will be tough to repeat, making it unlikely the results alone will spark a major rally, according to Christian Mueller-Glissmann.

title: Iluvatar CoreX Seeks to Raise $850 Million After Stock Rally
title_cn: Iluvatar CoreX 寻求在股价上涨后筹集 8.5 亿美元
summary: Shanghai Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor Co. is seeking to raise about $850 million from a share sale in Hong Kong after soaring since its initial public offering in January.

title: SpaceX Bulls Say Full Speed Ahead Despite Wobbles in the AI Trade
title_cn: 尽管人工智能行业出现动荡，但 SpaceX 仍将全速前进
summary: One analyst thinks the company will reach $10 trillion.

title: French Watchdog Orders Meta Negotiations Over News Copyright
title_cn: 法国监管机构下令就新闻版权进行元谈判
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was ordered by the French competition watchdog to hold talks with news organizations over copyright payments, following two complaints that the social media giant was abusing its dominant position.

title: Alibaba Shares Jump Most in 10 Months as Rebound Hopes Grow
title_cn: 随着反弹希望增强，阿里巴巴股价创 10 个月来最大涨幅
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s shares surged the most since September after investors turned optimistic on its earnings and shifted capital into major Chinese internet companies that had lagged the market.

title: Bolloré Wins Paris Court Ruling Over Vivendi Control Dispute
title_cn: Bolloré 赢得巴黎法院对维旺迪控制权纠纷的裁决
summary: Vincent Bolloré won a Paris ruling that — if it survives a further challenge — could end up saving his company billions of euros after judges backed his long-held claim that he didn’t control Vivendi SE before a split of the media conglomerate in 2024.

title: Apple Loses Spat With EU Over App Store and iPhone Rules
title_cn: 苹果在 App Store 和 iPhone 规则问题上与欧盟的争执败诉
summary: Apple Inc. lost a European Union court fight to stop its App Store and iPhone operating system being hit by the full-force of the bloc’s antitrust crackdown on Big Tech.

title: Labor Crunch Tests Growth Limits for US Data Center Builders
title_cn: 劳动力紧缩考验美国数据中心建设者的增长极限
summary: Following several quarters of record order books, a skilled-labor shortage is testing the limits of growth for the craft-labor providers who build data centers across the US.

title: Goldman Sachs Says Hyperscalers Are 'Well-Positioned'
title_cn: 高盛表示超大规模企业“处于有利地位”
summary: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, managing director for portfolio strategy and asset allocation at Goldman Sachs, says the levered positioning toward semiconductors got a bit "extreme" and that the trend is reversing. "The hyperscalers are quite well-positioned right now because they still own a lot of the infrastructure," Mueller-Glissmann tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI to Roll Out Top AI Model Globally After Limited Preview
title_cn: OpenAI 将在有限预览后在全球推出顶级人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI is set to release its most advanced model widely on Thursday and is expanding its preview globally, the company said.

title: Temasek Assets Break $400 Billion as AI Bets Boost Returns
title_cn: 人工智能押注推动回报淡马锡资产突破 4000 亿美元
summary: Singaporean state-owned investor Temasek Holdings Pte is ramping up its exposure to artificial intelligence and the Americas, a shift which helped push its net portfolio value to S$518 billion ($401 billion) in the last financial year.

title: Netherlands and UK Sign $3.2 Billion Deal on Amphibious Ships
title_cn: 荷兰和英国签署价值 32 亿美元的两栖舰协议
summary: The Netherlands and the UK signed a £2.4 billion ($3.2 billion) agreement to produce new amphibious transport ships, part of a flurry of deals between European NATO members in Ankara.

title: Australian Pension Shrugs Off AI Bubble Fears, Plans to Buy Dips
title_cn: 澳大利亚养老金摆脱对人工智能泡沫的担忧，计划逢低买入
summary: UniSuper, one of Australia’s largest pension funds, is looking to buy any pullback in US technology stocks, shrugging off concerns over lofty valuations as it bets artificial intelligence will fuel years of earnings growth.

title: Chip Worker Shortfall Endangers US Factory Revival
title_cn: 芯片工人短缺危及美国工厂复兴
summary: A growing nationwide shortage of high-skilled workers threatens to delay construction of billions of dollars in new semiconductor plants across the US and constrain future chip production unless the industry pools resources and the government keeps up funding, according to a new report.

title: Iluvatar CoreX Is Said to Consider Share Sale After 428% Rally
title_cn: 据称 Iluvatar CoreX 在上涨 428% 后考虑出售股票
summary: Shanghai Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor Co. is considering a share sale to raise at least $800 million in Hong Kong after soaring since its initial public offering in January, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tencent WeChat AI Agent Shows Promise in Super-App Fight: Review
title_cn: 腾讯微信AI代理在超级应用之战中展现出前景：评论
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is fighting to restore its reputation as a tech innovator after falling behind in the race to develop groundbreaking frontier AI models. It’s taking an important step in that direction with Xiaowei: a prototype AI agent that it envisions eventually running errands for a billion-plus users across a WeChat ecosystem spanning millions of apps.

title: US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Trump told reporters that he would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list during a bilat meeting with President Ahmed al-Sharaa of Syria during the NATO summit in Turkey. Trump praised the work al-Sharaa has done since he took power in 2024, saying 'he’s done a great job' with the country in the aftermath of its civil war. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rahm Emanuel Says US Should End Unconditional Support for Israel
title_cn: 拉姆·伊曼纽尔表示美国应停止对以色列的无条件支持
summary: Rahm Emanuel, a long-time Democratic supporter of Israel exploring a presidential run, warned Israel that it’s become a “pariah” under Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and said Washington should end unconditional support for its longtime ally.

title: European Parliament Blocks Move to Strip Soybeans of Renewable Status
title_cn: 欧洲议会阻止剥夺大豆的可再生地位
summary: The European Parliament blocked a move to strip soy-based biofuels of their renewable status, which would have phased out their contribution to European Union renewable energy targets by 2030.

title: Hungary Outlines Budget Milestones After Deficit Narrows
title_cn: 匈牙利概述了赤字缩小后的预算里程碑
summary: Hungary’s government outlined its next steps for tackling one of the biggest fiscal challenges in the European Union, having narrowed the shortfall in the first full month after taking office.

title: US Troop Withdrawal 'Will Not Be Drastic' Says NATO Military Committee Chair
title_cn: 北约军事委员会主席表示美军“不会大幅撤军”
summary: Chair of the NATO Military Committee Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone says they will be unaffected by the withdrawal of US troops, and believes the transition will be smooth. He spoke to Bloomberg Television's Oliver Crook on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Ankara on Wednesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump: US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List
title_cn: 特朗普：美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list. “I think I will. Why wouldn’t I? He’s done a great job,” Trump said Wednesday during a bilateral meeting with Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa on the sidelines of the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list as he met with the country’s president, Ahmed al-Sharaa, on the sidelines of the NATO summit.

title: Trump Says Carroll Shouldn’t Get $5 Million Before Verdict Final
title_cn: 特朗普称卡罗尔不应在最终判决前获得 500 万美元
summary: President Donald Trump asked a judge to withhold the $5 million plus interest he owes New York writer E. Jean Carroll, arguing the US Supreme Court hasn’t decided whether to reconsider his appeal in a sexual-abuse lawsuit.

title: Trump Says He Will Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles
title_cn: 特朗普称他将允许乌克兰制造爱国者导弹
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors, sending another signal of his shifting approach toward Russia’s war — and Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

title: Johannesburg to Pay $146 Million in Debts, Plans Bond Sale
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡将偿还 1.46 亿美元债务并计划出售债券
summary: The City of Johannesburg will pay creditors by next week in order to have 3.6 billion rand ($219 million) of government funding reinstated and is in talks about selling bonds to fund upgrades to infrastructure, Mayor Dada Morero said.

title: Trump Says US May Strike Iran Again, Threatens New Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普称美国可能再次打击伊朗并威胁实施新封锁
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would probably launch further strikes on Iran and could resume a blockade on the country’s ports, ratcheting up pressure on Tehran and raising the prospect of a return to all-out war.

title: Maine Democrats Rule Out Platner Role in Picking Replacement
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人排除普拉特纳在挑选继任者中的作用
summary: Maine’s Democratic Party urged Graham Platner to immediately withdraw from the race for a US Senate seat following allegations of sexual assault and vowed he would have no role in selecting his replacement.

title: Trump Hopes Putin-Zelenskyy Meeting Will Happen 'Soon'
title_cn: 特朗普希望普京与泽伦斯基会面“很快”举行
summary: US President Donald Trump says Russian President Vladimir Putin wants to end the war with Ukraine. Trump says he told Putin a meeting won't happen in Moscow. Trump spoke at the NATO summit in Turkey alongside Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Will Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普称他将允许乌克兰制造爱国者导弹（问答）
summary: US President Donald Trump  and Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy held a bilat today at the NATO Summit. At the Meeting Trump said he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors, a key weapon in repelling Russian attacks. Trump said US manufacturers would go to Ukraine to explain the process, and predicted Ukraine could produce the missiles "pretty quickly". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zelenskyy Says Russia Losing Initiative on Battlefield
title_cn: 泽伦斯基称俄罗斯失去战场主动权
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says the Russian army is losing initiative because of changes in military technology. He speaks during a meeting with US President Donald Trump in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rutte Says Next NATO Summit Will Be in Albania
title_cn: 吕特表示下次北约峰会将在阿尔巴尼亚举行
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte says the next summit will be held in Albania. "We still have to decide on exact timings," he adds. Rutte speaks during a press conference at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US Could Resume Hormuz Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国可以恢复霍尔木兹封锁
summary: President Donald Trump said the US could potentially take over Iran's Kharg Island and resume a blockade on the country's ports, ratcheting up pressure on Tehran and raising the prospect of a return to all-out war. He made the comments during a news conference at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fresh US Strikes on Iran Cast Shadow Across NATO Summit
title_cn: 美国对伊朗的新打击给北约峰会蒙上阴影
summary:
Fresh US strikes on Iran cast a shadow across the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey — as President Trump declared the ceasefire "over."

Annmarie Horden explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Plans More Flexibility for Industry in Carbon Overhaul
title_cn: 欧盟计划在碳改革方面为工业提供更大的灵活性
summary: The European Union aims to give its ailing industrial sector more flexibility in an upcoming reform of the bloc’s flagship carbon market, while ensuring companies boost investment in clean technologies.

title: Toyota’s Shift to US Stokes Fears for Mexican Auto Industry
title_cn: 丰田转向美国引发墨西哥汽车业担忧
summary: Mexico’s auto industry is bracing for a blow that could spread well beyond Toyota Motor Corp., after the Japanese automaker said it would move production of its popular Tacoma truck out of the country and into Texas.

title: The Indian Gangster Accused By US of Plotting Killings from Jail
title_cn: 印度黑帮被美国指控在监狱里密谋杀人
summary: A sweeping US dragnet of Indian crime syndicates has brought renewed attention to one of the country’s most notorious crime bosses and his alleged role in carrying out political killings overseas, including of a well-known Sikh activist in Canada.

title: Turkey in Line to Receive Six F-35 Jets If Trump Unblocks Sale
title_cn: 如果特朗普解除销售禁令，土耳其将接收六架 F-35 喷气式飞机
summary: Turkey is looking to secure the delivery of six F-35 jets from the US in an initial transaction, if President Donald Trump reverses a ban on Ankara buying the advanced fighter planes, according to Turkish officials familiar with the matter.

title: Trump Says US Will Give Ukraine License to Make Patriot Missiles
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将给予乌克兰制造爱国者导弹的许可证
summary: President Donald Trump, speaking at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey, says the US plans to give Ukraine a license to make their own air defense Patriot missiles. During a meeting with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, Trump says it's very complex, but we'll “show them how to do it.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michigan Senate Rivals Trade Blows Over Israel, AIPAC Influence
title_cn: 密歇根州参议院贸易对以色列、AIPAC影响力造成打击
summary: The two Michigan Democrats vying for their party’s nomination in a US Senate race clashed in a debate on Tuesday night over Middle East policy, focusing on America’s relations with Israel.

title: Trump Threatens to Take Iran’s Kharg Island, Reimpose Hormuz Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普威胁夺取伊朗哈格岛并重新实施霍尔木兹封锁
summary: US President Donald Trump Photographer: Alex Brandon/AP Photo

title: New York City Looks to Make Buses Faster With Priority Lanes
title_cn: 纽约市希望通过优先车道让公交车更快
summary: New York state and city officials are working to increase the speed of public buses, with a goal of cutting riders’ travel times by up to six minutes on about 50 priority routes.

title: Trump Says US Will 'Probably' Hit Iran Again Tonight
title_cn: 特朗普称美国今晚“可能”再次打击伊朗
summary: US President Donald Trump says the US will probably hit Iran "again tonight." Trump speaks at the NATO Summit in Ankara. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bain Capital's Pagliuca on AI, Quantum Computing, Sports Valuations
title_cn: 贝恩资本的 Pagliuca 谈人工智能、量子计算、体育估值
summary: A clutch of growing industries, including artificial intelligence, are the key focus of investment for Bain Capital LP Senior Adviser Steve Pagliuca. He says AI is entering a 10-to-20-year growth phase as it shifts from theoretical applications to physical deployment across sectors. The Boston Celtics co-owner owner also talks about the rising valuations of professional franchises with Bloomberg's Michelle Davis on the sidelines of the Allen & Co Inc. conference in Sun Valley, Idaho. They spoke on Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Allies Commit to Giving Ukraine Military Aid Through 2027
title_cn: 北约盟国承诺在 2027 年之前向乌克兰提供军事援助
summary: NATO members pledged €70 billion ($80 billion) in military aid to Ukraine for 2026 and “at least the equivalent levels” in 2027, ensuring continued support as Russia’s war shows few signs of abating.
